title: Week of April 13, 2026
summary: This week brought significant improvements to session performance tracking and platform reliability. OpsPal now provides better insights into workflow efficiency while running more smoothly behind the scenes. The Skills library was also expanded with 98 enhanced automation templates to help RevOps teams work faster.

entries.headline: Track workflow performance and troubleshoot session issues
details: Monitor how smoothly your automation workflows run and identify bottlenecks that slow down your processes
Get detailed performance insights to optimize your RevOps operations

entries.headline: Resolved license activation issues
details: Fixed problems where OpsPal would get stuck trying to reactivate licenses
Platform now runs more reliably without interruption

entries.headline: Enhanced 98 automation skills for better RevOps workflows
details: Updated and expanded the Skills library with more comprehensive automation templates
Improved organization makes it easier to find the right automation for your needs

entries.headline: Better Salesforce workflow validation and permissions
details: Improved accuracy when checking Salesforce Flow configurations
Automatic permission assignment ensures workflows run without access errors
